---
title: "Effective Connectivity in an Impulsivity Network"
presenter: Grace Hodges
pres_group: presentations
date: '2026-05-01'
event: SOBP 2026
description: "Grace Hodges, Zachary Brodnick, Daisy Beale, Kami Pearson, Jessica Turner"
image: presentation.jpg
page-layout: full
---

![](presentation.jpg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}
